test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_kc_large_in ( ts DateTime('UTC') ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (toYYYYMM(ts), toDate(ts), ts)
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_kc_large_in SELECT toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00', 'UTC') + number FROM numbers(10000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM test_kc_large_in WHERE ts IN (SELECT toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00', 'UTC') + number * 977 FROM numbers(10000))
